#!/usr/bin/bash
#
# Config for the script collection to conduct STEP2
# deriving a bc_land_frac.nc file from ESACCI data for use in ICON-Land simulations (see README.md)

#############################################################################
##################### Change according to your data #########################
#############################################################################

# model (defines workflow and specific settings below)
model=quincy #jsbach or quincy

# name of the output directory
output_dir_name=./YOUROUTPUTPATH

# cdo name of the grid (here 0.25deg)
grid_name="global_0.25"

# ----- Input: ESACCI
# path to the ESACCI file
esacci_file_pathway=/work/mj0143/icon_land_data_pool/preprocessing/esacci/rev004/
esacci_file_name=ESACCI
esacci_specific=LC-L4-LCCS-Map-300m-P1Y-aggregated-0.250000Deg
esacci_year=2022
esacci_vol=v2.1.1
input_file_esacci=${esacci_file_pathway}/${model}_${esacci_file_name}-${esacci_specific}-${esacci_year}-${esacci_vol}.nc

# esacci variables to be used (model dependent)
if [ ${model} == "jsbach" ]; then
  esacci_out_vars=bare,C,P,H,E,D,S,ice,urban,water
  esacci_final_vars=bare,H,E,D,S
  esacci_derived_vars=bare,H,HC4,TE,TD,ETE,ETD,RShrubs,DShrubs
elif [ ${model} == "quincy" ]; then
  esacci_out_vars=bare,C,P,H,NEDE,NEEV,BRDE,BREV,ice,urban,water
  esacci_final_vars=bare,H,NEDE,NEEV,BRDE,BREV
  esacci_derived_vars=bare,H,HC4,NEDE,NEEV,TrBE,TeBE,TrBR,TeBS
else
  echo "Unknown model selected (${model}), please check!"
  exit 1
fi
expStringEsacciMask=$(echo ${esacci_derived_vars} | sed 's/,/\+/g')

# ----- Climatology (annual precip, tavg and coldest month mean temp calculations)
#       used for temperature and precipitation thresholds for splits of c3/c4 plants and broadleafed PFTs
# Pathway to the file
forcing_type="gswp3"
climate_file="climate_gswp3_025_daily_"
climate_input_path=/work/mj0143/icon_land_data/forcing/gswp3/regridded_025/

# Selected years to calculate the climatology from
clim_start_year=1991
clim_end_year=2019

# specifications for output
tmin_tag="avg_of_coldest_month_mean_temperature_"
tmin_name="clim_min_tmonmean"

# Note: the unit of precipitation differs between forcings, CRUJRA has mm/day i.e. yearsum of daily data = "mm"
#       -> for GSWP3 or other forcings the threshold or the target_unit/ calculations within calculate_climatologies might need to be adapted!
precip_target_unit="mm"
# Broadleaved splitting thresholds (suggested for precipitation = 1200 mm, min_mean_temperature = 15 degC)
precip_threshold=1200
min_mean_temperature_threshold=15

# ----- Additional input only required for jsbach
if [ ${model} == "jsbach" ]; then
  # path to 1991-2020 Koppen-Geiger map file
  jsb_KG_map=/work/mj0143/icon_land_data_pool/mpim/025/land_cover_fraction/prepro/rev001/BECK-et-all-2023_koppen_geiger_1991-2020_0p1_to_025_remaplaf.nc
fi

#---------------------------------------------- Misc
# ----- info for attributes of the netcdf output file
# specify the used cross walking table
if [ ${model} == "jsbach" ]; then
  cw_table="cw_jsb_based-on-Tab4_with_TabC1_bare_20250907.csv"
elif [ ${model} == "quincy" ]; then
  cw_table="cw_IQ_11-for-13_based-on-Tab4_20250829.csv"
fi

# global attributes
esacci_preprocessing="Prepared ESACCI ${esacci_year} (${esacci_file_name}-${esacci_specific}; ${esacci_vol}) lccs classes for further preprocessing for ${model}"
esacci_preprocessing="${esacci_preprocessing} -- used pft conversion table ${cw_table}: adapted from Harper et al. (2023) - Table 4"
esacci_preprocessing="${esacci_preprocessing}; contact: jnabel@bgc-jena.mpg.de"
esacci_comment="Used from ESACCI ${esacci_year}: nat. PFTs and bare. Split derived pfts to ${model} pfts using ${forcing_type} climatology." 
esacci_reference="Harper et al. (2023) A 29-year time series of annual 300 m resolution plant-functional-type maps for climate models"

# ----- Program flow specifications
# name of temp directory
temporary_dir=${output_dir_name}/${model}/temp_files

# Do you want to keep temp_files?[Y/N]
keep_tmp_dir=N

# set cdo command to be silent and create no history
cdo="cdo -s --no_history -b 64"
